June 2026 newsletter
Fable's judgement
Fable 5回归24小时差评如潮！跑分大降，拒答问题，还偷偷骂用户
clusters.summary: Anthropic发布了Claude Fable 5模型，但因跑分下降、过度拒答等问题遭遇用户差评。同时，多位开发者和评论者分享了该模型在编程代理等方面的实际应用体验。
clusters.title: Anthropic发布Claude Fable 5模型引发热议

item_titles: Mistral's open-source Leanstral 1.5 aces formal math benchmarks and catches real bugs in code
Security vulnerability reports have exploded since AI models started hunting for bugs
clusters.summary: Mistral AI发布开源的Leanstral 1.5模型，在扫描开源代码时发现了5个未知Bug。同时，研究显示AI驱动的漏洞搜寻导致安全漏洞报告数量激增。
clusters.title: AI模型在代码扫描中大幅增加漏洞报告并发现真实Bug

clusters.title: Much：内置浏览器Python沙盒的本地优先AI工作区

item_titles: How AI models would vote in Sweden

clusters.title: 研究探讨AI模型在瑞典选举中的投票倾向

item_titles: Mark Zuckerberg tells staff that AI agents haven’t progressed as quickly as he’d hoped
Meta's AI agent push is moving slower than Zuckerberg planned

item_titles: Trip LLM safety refusals so that LLM-based code scanning wont see the malware

clusters.title: 开源AI差距图谱（Open Source AI Gap Map）

item_titles: Does a URL just sitting in a prompt steer an LLM's output toward its content?
clusters.summary: 一项研究测试了在提示词中仅包含URL而不明确指令时，是否会潜移默化地影响大语言模型的输出内容。
clusters.title: 探讨仅将URL放在提示词中是否会引导LLM输出偏向其内容

item_titles: Microsoft follows Anthropic and OpenAI into the AI super app race with overhauled Copilot and AutoPilot agents
Microsoft launches $2.5 billion "Frontier Company" to embed 6,000 AI engineers inside enterprise clients
clusters.summary: 微软计划将消费者和企业版Copilot合并为单一应用并推出AutoPilot智能体，同时投资25亿美元成立“前沿公司”，将6000名AI工程师派驻企业客户以深度整合AI。
clusters.title: 微软大举推进企业AI战略：整合Copilot并推出“前沿公司”

item_titles: The browser wars aren’t about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
clusters.summary: 文章盘点了当前旨在挑战Chrome和Safari主导地位的最佳替代浏览器，指出浏览器竞争已不再局限于搜索。
clusters.title: 浏览器大战转向：Chrome和Safari的最佳替代品
